headline: 329 days behind: double your effort starting now
summary: You're losing at half the pace required; TODAY you double the effort with strict portions and cardio intensity to start closing your deficit.
details: Today: lock in Huel for lunch and dinner (portion-controlled), avoid all snacking triggers by 8pm—redirect food cravings to water and movement. Execute 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill intervals this morning, then a 10-minute walk this evening; this builds the 0.58 kg/week deficit you need. Monday after a solid last week is critical: you're 329 days behind schedule, and this consistency compounds—every single day either closes the gap or deepens it.
